name: Waldorf Salad a La Russe
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, blend the Wish Bone Russian Dressing with the sour cream.
2. Add the diced apple, diced celery, and chopped walnuts to the mixture.
3. Toss everything together until well combined.
4. If desired, serve in lettuce cups.
5. Makes 4 servings.
